languages.text: "Я дам вам врага, которого вы еще не видели!"
"I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
languages.original_text: "Я дам вам врага, которого вы еще не видели!"

traits.locale_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
"I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
"I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
"I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
"I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

languages.text: “我将给予你们一个前所未见的强敌！”
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: “我将给予你们一个前所未见的强敌！”

languages.text: "Sizi daha önce hiç görmediğiniz bir düşmanın karşısına çıkaracağım!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: "Sizi daha önce hiç görmediğiniz bir düşmanın karşısına çıkaracağım!"

languages.text: « Je vous offrirai un ennemi que vous n'avez jusque-là jamais affronté ! »
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous offrirai un ennemi que vous n'avez jusque-là jamais affronté ! »

languages.text: «¡Les daré un enemigo al que jamás se han enfrentado!».
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Les daré un enemigo al que jamás se han enfrentado!».

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch einen Gegner geben, dem Ihr noch nie gegenübergestanden habt!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch einen Gegner geben, dem Ihr noch nie gegenübergestanden habt!"

languages.text: 「私は貴様らに、かつて相見えたことのない敵を授けよう！」
languages.original_text: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は貴様らに、かつて相見えたことのない敵を授けよう！」
